name: Weird Cinema
short_description: If you were put in a horror movie, would you survive? Play multiple roles in various classic horror films. Try to survive in horror films by decrypting and fighting
detailed_description:
Use various props on the map to solve the puzzle, escape from the sky under the hands of murderers, and experience the excitement that can't be escaped in the checkpoints based on various well-known films.

If you were in a horror movie, would you survive?

Play multiple roles in various classic horror films. Trying to survive in horror movies by decrypting and fighting.

Be careful! An unintentional mistake can lead to you and your friends being killed by a killer!

There will be a chain reaction between each level, and if you want a perfect story, you must complete all the hidden plots

The game tells that on a street, players watch all kinds of horror films in the cinema that only shows horror films.

In the game, players will take turns to play multiple roles and look for survival opportunities in levels designed according to various horror films.

I like the game Lakeview Cabin Collection very much, so I found the author Roope Tamminen and made the game with his consent and support.

The game will contain at least seven main levels.

*The game currently has four complete levels, and other levels are still under production

Level List
3. Blocked streets: In this level, the characters you control will gradually fall asleep, and you must uncover the truth of events in the dreams of each character, while enemies that cannot be killed will continue to chase you
4. Blood Camp: In this level, you play the role of a rock band member who comes to the island to participate in a variety show. In the evening, the crew members collectively disappear, and several terrifying murderers appear on the island, one of whom is actually a companion looking for a way out
5. Strange strangers: In this level, you play the role of several college students gathering at home, and several strangers who have not accepted the invitation wander around your home, perhaps they have already entered
6. Kill Cube: In this level, you play the role of an experimenter in the experimental facility. You must identify who is lying and eliminate the enemy that is blocking your escape. A slaughter begins, and you must survive to find the exit
